PETITION FOR CONSEVATEE'S PLACEMENT IN HER LEASR RESTRICTIVE ENVIORNMENT, CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2023 ,IS PRESENTED AND ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT STATED THAT IT FINDS THE LEAST RESTRICTIVE SETTING/PLACEMENT IS THE CONSERVATEE'S APARTMENT, THAT IT DIRECTS MR. CUNNINGHAM TO TAKE STEPS TO MOVE THE CONSERVATEE BACK HOME WITH SOME FLEXIBILITY. STATUS ON PLACEMENT IS SET FOR NOVEMBER 16, 2023, AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 204. MS. EMMONS IS TO PREPARE THE ORDER. (SEE MINI-MINUTES THIS DATE FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ROSS C. MOODY. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. COURT INVESTIGATOR: ASSISTANT PROBATE DIRECTOR NAOMI BRANDES. DEPUTY: SINGH. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
